title: AAAI 2026 Summer Symposium Series
description: Annual set of AI symposia running in parallel at a common site, designed to bring colleagues together in an intimate forum while providing a significant gathering point for the AI community. Features a two-and-a-half-day format for in-depth feedback and discussion.

title: Festival of Learning 2026 (including AIED 2026 and ACM Learning at Scale)
description: Brings together academic communities in AI, Education, Learning Sciences, and Human-Computer Interaction. Co-locates multiple conferences including AIED 2026 (27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education, June 29 - July 3) and ACM Learning at Scale (June 29 - July 3).

title: International Conference on Cybersecurity and Artificial Intelligence (ICCAI)
description: International conference focusing on cybersecurity and artificial intelligence. Offers both virtual and in-person attendance options.

title: International Conference on Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence Applications (ICMLAIA)
description: International conference focused on machine learning and AI applications. Available in virtual and in-person formats.

title: International Conference on Machine Learning and Data Analytics (ICMLDA)
description: International conference on machine learning and data analytics. Features both virtual and in-person participation modes.

title: ICML 2026 (International Conference on Machine Learning)
description: One of the premier machine learning conferences globally. July 6: Expo/Tutorial Day; July 7-9: Main Conference; July 10-11: Workshops. Major annual gathering for ML researchers, practitioners, and industry leaders.

title: International Conference on AI and Big Data for Bioinformatics Applications (ICABDBA)
description: Conference on AI and big data applications in bioinformatics. Supports virtual and in-person attendance.

title: International Conference on Robotics Software Debugging with AI (ICRSDAI)
description: Conference focused on robotics software debugging using AI techniques. Offers both virtual and in-person participation options.

title: International Conference on AI and Robotics Software Lifecycle Management (ICAIRSLM)
description: Conference on AI and robotics software lifecycle management. Available in virtual and in-person formats.

title: AI Summit Seoul 2026 (AIS 2026)
venue: COEX Grand Ballroom & Exhibition Hall B, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
description: Korea's leading AI conference and exhibition bringing together global AI leaders, industry experts, and innovators. Features conference sessions, enterprise case studies, and a dynamic expo showcasing cutting-edge AI technologies. Focuses on convergence of AI and industry.

title: International Conference on Machine Learning and Cybernetics (ICMLC)
description: International conference covering machine learning and cybersecurity topics.
